LanguageData.CrimsonBloodrush.label: bloodrush surge
LanguageData.CrimsonBloodrush.description: Force your bloodline into an aggressive overdrive. Melee lethality and speed surge for a short duration while incoming risk increases.
LanguageData.CrimsonSovereignGaze.label: sovereign gaze
LanguageData.CrimsonSovereignGaze.description: Impose aristocratic predatory pressure on a target, slowing movement and weakening evasive posture.
